description: Per-arch / NIC interconnect spec map keyed by gfx_id (e.g., 'gfx942') or NIC codename (e.g., 'connectx7'). Source of truth for interconnect.lookup_peaks().

xgmi_peak_gbps.description: Aggregate bidirectional XGMI bandwidth (0 for NICs or GPUs without XGMI).

pcie_tier.description: Human-readable PCIe generation/width label, e.g. 'PCIe Gen5 x16'.

achievable_gbps.description: Typical RCCL AllReduce busBW observed in practice.
